entry.title: New: BILL048(25) (Honolulu) — ZON
entry.content:
RELATING TO PEDESTRIAN MALLS.

Establishes a portion of Chaplain Lane as a pedestrian mall closed to vehicular traffic with certain exceptions. Authorizes the DTS to control and coordinate the use of the newly established Chaplain Lane pedestrian mall. Takes effect on December 1, 2025.

Latest action: Postponed to a date and time to be determined by the Committee Chair.

View on the council site
